message:
feat(e2e): add DCG block/approve + audit trail E2E tests (bd-1vr1.12)

Full lifecycle tests for the DCG pending exception flow:
- Block event ingestion via API
- Command test/explain endpoints
- Pending exception approve/deny workflows
- Allow-once validation with hash verification
- Audit trail verification (stats, filtering, false positives)
- UI workflow tests with E2E logging framework

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
